hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" <<< "$input"); [[ "$file" == /Users/valeriepun/Edoc/public/* && "$file" != */index.html ]] || exit 0; html="/Users/valeriepun/Edoc/public/index.html"; current=$(grep -o 'V [0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*' "$html" | head -1); [ -z "$current" ] && exit 0; patch=$(echo "$current" | awk -F. '{print $3}'); newpatch=$((patch + 1)); newver=$(echo "$current" | sed "s/\.[0-9]*$/.$newpatch/"); sed -i '' "s/$current/$newver/" "$html" 2>/dev/null || true
